commit.message:
Change progress bar formatting to per-package aggregated tree display (#261)

* Initial plan

* feat: change progress bar formatting to show aggregated package progress with tree glyphs

- Add spec/cli/progress-bar.md with requirements
- Add progress_bar.rs module with extracted, testable rendering logic
- Change per-layer bars to single aggregated bar per package
- Show namespace:name form instead of full OCI URL
- Use yellow bar + grey size/ETA while downloading
- Show green name with just total size when complete
- Display tree glyphs (├── / └──) for package list
- Add comprehensive unit tests for display, aggregation, and formatting

Co-authored-by: yoshuawuyts <2467194+yoshuawuyts@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: address code review feedback - clarify comments and docs

Co-authored-by: yoshuawuyts <2467194+yoshuawuyts@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: dynamic tree glyphs via ProgressTree, @version color white, strip_ansi_codes in tests

- ProgressTree tracks all bars and dynamically updates └── / ├── glyphs
  as new bars are added; the last bar always shows └──
- Changed @version color from grey/dim to white
- Tests use console::strip_ansi_codes() instead of global set_colors_enabled()
- Style tests validate PROGRESS_TEMPLATE / DONE_TEMPLATE constants
- finish_package_bar only called on Ok(result), not on Err
- Updated spec: version-grey → version-white

Co-authored-by: yoshuawuyts <2467194+yoshuawuyts@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: match version in finish_bar, simplify test format, fix offline glyph

Co-authored-by: yoshuawuyts <2467194+yoshuawuyts@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: handle unknown total_bytes with bytes-only style, improve style tests

- Add INITIAL_TEMPLATE and initial_style() for bytes-only display before
  any layer total is known (avoids misleading "0 B" totals)
- run_progress_bars() switches from initial_style to progress_style when
  first LayerStarted with Some(total_bytes) arrives
- add_bar() now uses initial_style() initially
- Add tests verifying all three style factory functions produce valid
  ProgressStyle instances (progress_style, done_style, initial_style)
- Add test for INITIAL_TEMPLATE content (no bar/total/eta)
- Add test for style-switching behavior on known total

Co-authored-by: yoshuawuyts <2467194+yoshuawuyts@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: rename has_known_total to style_upgraded for clarity

Co-authored-by: yoshuawuyts <2467194+yoshuawuyts@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: match bars by BarId, pass offline through, derive namespace:name from OCI repos

- finish_bar() now identifies entries by unique BarId instead of
  name/version strings, preventing misidentification of concurrent
  installs with the same display name
- Pass the offline variable through to install_one() instead of
  hard-coding false
- Add oci_repo_display_name() to derive namespace:name format from
  OCI repository paths (e.g. ghcr.io/webassembly/wasi-logging →
  webassembly:wasi-logging)
- Add 4 tests for oci_repo_display_name covering 1/2/3+ path segments

Co-authored-by: yoshuawuyts <2467194+yoshuawuyts@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: avoid cloning in finish_bar, add debug log for unknown BarId

Co-authored-by: yoshuawuyts <2467194+yoshuawuyts@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix installation

* fix: finish_bar uses BarId only, fix 0 B on unknown totals, offline mode yellow

1. finish_bar() now takes only BarId (no ProgressBar param) — operates
   on the stored entry bar exclusively, preventing mismatched pb/id pairs.
2. When all LayerStarted.total_bytes are None, sets bar length to
   final position before finishing so DONE_TEMPLATE shows actual bytes
   downloaded instead of "0 B".
3. Offline mode now prints package name in yellow (not green), since
   green indicates completion and install hasn't run yet.

Co-authored-by: yoshuawuyts <2467194+yoshuawuyts@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: combine finish_bar lookups into single get_mut, add comment for '/' check

commit.message:
Fix gameplay loop freeze after boss kill + artifact pick (#96)

* Initial plan

* fix: gameplay loop stops after boss fight and artifact pick

Bug 1 (main): CombatOrchestrator._isFighting was never reset after boss
fights because OnFightEnded() was only wired to _fightEnded, but
GameFlowController raises _bossFightEnded instead after a boss fight.
Added _bossFightEnded VoidEventChannel field and subscribed OnFightEnded
to it so _isFighting is correctly cleared.

Bug 2 (secondary): RunProgressionService.HandleNextFight() raised
_fightStarted twice for normal fights (once inside the else block, once
unconditionally). Removed the duplicate raise inside the else block.

Co-authored-by: edvinklaebo <4660058+edvinklaebo@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: Enhanced CSV import with 15 additional optional fields (#649)

* feat: Enhanced CSV import with 15 additional optional fields

Add comprehensive support for importing user data with 15 additional optional fields,
including user info (department, company, phones), location info, and RADIUS session
control attributes.

## Changes

### CSV Format Enhancement
- Extended CSV support from 5-7 fields to 5-20 fields
- Maintains backward compatibility with existing 5-field format

### New Import Fields

**Priority 1 - User Info (3 fields):**
- department: Department name
- company: Company name
- mobilephone: Mobile phone number

**Priority 1 - Additional Phone (2 fields):**
- workphone: Work phone number
- homephone: Home phone number

**Priority 2 - Session Control (3 fields):**
- sessiontimeout: Session timeout in seconds (stored in radcheck)
- idletimeout: Idle timeout in seconds (stored in radcheck)
- maxdailysession: Maximum daily session in seconds (stored in radcheck)

**Priority 4 - Location Info (5 fields):**
- address: Street address
- city: City name
- state: State/Province
- country: Country name
- zip: Postal/ZIP code

### Implementation Details

**Validation:**
- IP addresses validated using IP_REGEX constant
- Expiration dates converted from YYYY-MM-DD to FreeRADIUS format (d M Y)
- Timeout fields must be numeric if provided
- Invalid data causes row to be skipped (doesn't fail entire import)

**Data Storage:**
- User info fields stored in `userinfo` table
- Session attributes stored in `radcheck` table
- IP addresses stored in `radreply` table
- Uses existing `add_user_info()` and `insert_single_attribute()` functions

**Updated Documentation:**
- Comprehensive tooltip with field descriptions
- Example CSV showing all 20 fields
- Clear indication of required vs optional fields

## Testing

Test CSV formats:
- Full 20-field import with all data
- Partial imports with varying field counts
- Backward compatibility with original 5-field format
- Validation of IP addresses, dates, and numeric timeouts

## Files Modified

- app/operators/mng-import-users.php: Enhanced CSV parsing and data import
